findings.title: CI host.json validation step has invalid Python/heredoc indentation and will fail
findings.rationale: Extra leading whitespace in assertions and heredoc terminator breaks the validation block.
findings.recommendation: Fix indentation or move validation into a dedicated script/test file.

findings.title: Move host.json assertions to a dedicated script/test to avoid YAML indentation regressions
findings.rationale: Inline YAML heredoc Python is indentation-fragile.
findings.recommendation: Run dedicated host.json validation from a committed test/script file.

findings.title: Host.json validation step references a file that must be committed in PR
findings.rationale: CI would fail if tests/test_host_json.py is not committed with the workflow change.
findings.recommendation: Commit tests/test_host_json.py in the same PR.

findings.title: Avoid running host.json validation twice in CI
findings.rationale: Dedicated validation step plus full pytest suite duplicates host.json test execution.
findings.recommendation: Exclude tests/test_host_json.py from the later full test run.
